component_subtype.description: Dotted taxonomy path, e.g. discrete.diode.schottky, connector.usb

component_subtype_description.description: Brief description of the component subtype. Used when this is a new taxonomy entry.

pintable.description: Pin table for the component. Include ALL pins.

values.description: Extracted parameter values keyed ONLY by parameter names from the PARAMETERS TO EXTRACT list. Use SPICE multiplier prefixes (k, M, m, u, n, p) with units. Use null for missing/inapplicable parameters. Do NOT add parameters not in the list.
